channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 3 US troops killed and 5 are seriously wounded during Iran attacks, military says
item.description: Three U.S. service members have been killed and five others seriously wounded during the attacks on Iran.

item.title: FBI investigates Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and wounded 14 as possible terrorist act
Rev. Jesse Jackson returns home to South Carolina to lie in state
